title: draba alpina var. oxycarpa
intro: Draba alpina var. oxycarpa, also known as Alpine Whitlow Grass, is a type of flowering plant in the Brassicaceae family. It is used in herbal medicine due to its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory problems. Alpine Whitlow Grass can be prepared as a tincture, salve, or infused oil to take advantage of its medicinal properties and health benefits.
